answers: CNC (Computer Numerical Control) = automated machining using computer programs. Mills, routers, lathes all can be CNC.
CNC router for beginners: cuts wood, plastic, aluminum. Design in CAD, generate toolpaths in CAM, send to machine.
CNC vs 3D printing: CNC removes material (subtractive), 3D printing adds material (additive). CNC is stronger and faster for many parts.
CNC basics: learn CAD/CAM software, understand feeds and speeds, material properties, and safety procedures.
